parents.subject: LU-19157 nodemap: make nodemap name optional for banlist

commit.subject: LU-17771 debug: getstripe -r to recursively getstripe
commit.message:
LU-17771 debug: getstripe -r to recursively getstripe

'-r' is the correct option to recursively get the stripe information
under a directory.

'-R' is for printing layout information without substituting the
filesystem's default values for unspecified fields.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity env=ONLY=56s, ONLY_REPEAT=100
Signed-off-by: Bobi Jam <bobijam@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ib6ef3ddb431e5f33a070c6ea435b7821b8fabb9d
